name: phykit_batch_analysis
description: Run PhyKIT phylogenetics functions (treeness, saturation, dvmc, long_branch_score, total_tree_length, parsimony_informative) on a directory of tree/alignment files. Returns summary statistics (mean, median, min, max). For long_branch_score, aggregates per-taxon values within each tree before cross-tree summary. Use for batch phylogenetic analyses comparing gene trees across organism groups.

operation.description: single: one file, batch: all files in directory, gap_percentage: compute gap % across alignments

file.description: Path to single tree/alignment file (for operation=single)

directory.description: Directory containing tree/alignment files (for operation=batch or gap_percentage)

extension.description: File extension to match (default: .treefile for trees, .fa for alignments)

tree_directory.description: Directory with paired tree files (for saturation function)

per_tree_stat.description: How to summarize per-tree values for long_branch_score (default: mean)
